Welcome to the ICS Intranet
ICS Intranet Wiki
The ICS Intranet is a secure space where ICS departments and business units can manage and share internal information. Please refer to the left sidebar for department-specific content, such as:
Internal forms and templates
Staff contacts and schedules
Meeting notes and agendas
Policy documents and guidelines
IT support resources
Event planning tools and calendars
School Faculty Information
UCI General Information
ICS Business Units
Business Office
Communications
Computer Science Department
Computing Support
Facilities
Informatics Department
Personnel
Statistics Department
Student Affairs
Additional ICS Resources
ICS Wellness Hub
ICS Computing Support Wiki
